name: top of a palm tree
description: I'm in a top of a palm tree
hints: You climbed to the top of a palm tree! Coconuts are here.
GET COCO to take the coconuts. They're useful for food and liquid.
Coconuts provide sustenance on the island. D climbs back down to the jungle.
D=jungle (4). GET COCO for food/drink. Reached by CLIM TREE from jungle.
